summary: The diff implements all five requirements (REQ-15 through REQ-19) with good coverage. REQ-16 backend Carry Forward variant is added, REQ-17 frontend status control and styling is updated, REQ-15 Team Members section is implemented, REQ-18 notification reminders include carry-forward, and REQ-19 custom date-range export is added. One minor gap exists: the notification bell labels carry-forward tasks as 'Carry Forward' rather than the specified 'Carry Forward — needs attention' label. The CSV columns include 'Conference Name' as an extra column beyond the specified set.

missing_requirements.requirement: Carry-forward tasks should appear in the NotificationBell panel with a distinct urgency label 'Carry Forward — needs attention'.
missing_requirements.reason: The NotificationBell diff shows the label configured as 'Carry Forward' only. The ReminderItem config for carryForward sets label: 'Carry Forward' not 'Carry Forward — needs attention'.

hallucinated_features.description: CSV export includes a 'Conference Name' column not listed in the required column set.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-19 specifies columns: Task Title, Description, Assignee, Deadline, Priority, Status, Created At. The generateCsv function includes 'Conference Name' as an additional column not in the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend migration module (migration.mo) was added to handle schema migration for the new CarryForward status.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-16 only requires adding #CarryForward as a status variant and updating relevant functions. No migration module was requested in any requirement.
